title: Power Mod
description: Given three integers b, e and m, compute (b^e) mod m. Fast exponentiation required for large values.
inputSpec: Three integers b, e and m on a single line.

botCodes.code:
b, e, m = map(int, input().split())
print(pow(b, e, m))

def power_mod(b, e, m):
    result = 1
    b = b % m
    while e > 0:
        if e % 2 == 1:
            result = result * b % m
        b = b * b % m
        e //= 2
    return result

b, e, m = map(int, input().split())
print(power_mod(b, e, m))
